title: Kentwell Rounded Plain Tufted Doormat Hardwearing PVC Backed Coir Anti Slip Mat (80cm x 50cm)
features: These Traditional Tufted Kentwell Mats Are Sturdy, Have A Coir, Non Slip Backing And Would Be Ideal For Cleaning Boots And Shoes On Before Leaving The House.
Only Available In Brown And In The Following Sizes:
60Cm X 40Cm 24 X 16 , 70Cm X 40Cm 28 X 16 Or 80Cm X 50Cm 80 X 20 .
These Durable And Resilient Doormats Are Ideal For Outdoor Use Or For The Hallway, Porch Or Conservatory.
Images Are For Illustration Purposes Only, Dimensions Are Approximate.
description: Product description These traditional tufted coir Kentwell mats are hardwearing, have an anti slip backing and would be ideal for cleaning boots and shoes on before entering the house. Available in Brown only and in the following sizes 60cm x 40cm 24 x 16 . 70cm x 40cm 28 x 16 . 80cm x 50cm 31.5 x 20 . These hardwearing and heavy duty doormats are perfect for outdoor use or for the hallway, porch or conservatory. Photographs are for illustrative purposes only and all measurements are approximate. This Kentwell mat is hardwearing, has an anti slip backing and is made from tufted coir. Colour Light Brown. Size 80cm x 50cm. Material Coir Mat with PVC Anti Slip Backing. Care Instructions Machine Washable. Safety Warning Caution: This mat has an anti-slip backing that may become slippery when wet. Always ensure the mat is dry before use. Machine washable, but avoid tumble drying to prevent damage. This mat is made from coir, a natural fiber that may cause allergic reactions in some individuals. Keep away from open flames and heat sources to prevent fire hazards.
